title: Genesis 3 Reading
subtitle: Clarity held under restraint; thought disciplined into structure rather than expression
description: An exegetical reading of Genesis 3, focusing on the structural movement of the text from distortion to relational questioning. It represents a shift from meaning-maker to meaning-receiver, prioritizing epistemic integrity over devotional gloss.

motifMap.meaning: Structure replaces symbol; quieter but more stable meaning-making.
Slowing down and tracking structure without fully surrendering interpretation.

excerpt: I’ll treat this as an exegetical reading, not a devotional gloss—tracking what the text actually does…

sourceInputs: Phase Analysis 3.0 — Pale Moon Guarding (Exegetical Form)

integrity.notes: Generated based on Phase Analysis 3.0 for Pale Moon Guarding — Exegetical Form. Focus on text-constrained meaning and epistemic integrity.
